title: ecbolium subcordatum
intro: Ecbolium subcordatum, also known as the blue flowered ecbolium, is a plant species in the bignonia family and is native to the tropical regions of Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. It has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues, as well as being used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and antipyretic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, but it is essential to note that more research is required to fully understand its effectiveness and potential interactions.
